verses.book: Prefaces to the Books of the Vulgate Version of the Old Testament.
verses.text: This is addressed to Paula and Eustochium.

verses.book: Prefaces to the Books of the Vulgate Version of the Old Testament.
verses.text: Jerome describes the numerous emendations he has had to make in what was then the received Latin text, but says he has not found the same necessity in dealing with Ecclesiasticus.

verses.book: Prefaces to the Books of the Vulgate Version of the Old Testament.
verses.text: He adds, “All I aim at is to give you a revised edition of the Canonical Scriptures, and to employ my Latin on what is certain rather than on what is doubtful.”
